Open Source Projects

gwbench

Gravitational-Wave Detector & Network Benchmarking

Lead Developer

2019 – Present

  • Open-source Python package for Fisher-Matrix-based benchmarking of gravitational-wave detector networks.
  • Adopted as a primary analysis tool by the Einstein Telescope and Cosmic Explorer collaborations.
  • Highly modular and streamlined user experience for large-scale computational studies.
  • Documented, packaged, and maintained for long-term community use; peer-reviewed publication.
GitLab Class. Quant. Grav. 38 (2021) — arXiv:2010.15202

xkn

Kilonova Modeling Framework

Core Developer

2021 – 2023

  • Python package to generate kilonova light curves from binary neutron star mergers.
  • Key contributions: Implementation of accessible user interface and optimization for computational efficiency.
  • Documented, packaged, and maintained for long-term community use; peer-reviewed publication.
GitHub MNRAS 529 (2024) 647-663 — arXiv:2311.15709
